name: Best Ever Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream sugar and shortening, then add eggs one at a time.
2. Sift flour three times with cocoa and salt.
3. Add the sifted ingredients alternately with buttermilk.
4. Mix in soda and boiling water.
5. Grease and flour a 9 x 13 x 2 inch pan.
6. Bake at 300 degrees Fahrenheit for 90 minutes, or until done.
7. Cool and ice with your favorite icing (preferably chocolate).
